checks.name: taxonomy_completeness
checks.description: All 7 SignalSynthesisEngine conditions have consequence mappings in §4
checks.details: DPC (§4.2), DCkP (§4.3), PA (§4.4), SMC (§4.5), CDCP (§4.6), GCS-GAP (§4.7), GCS-COMPLETE (§4.7), CC (§4.8) — all mapped

checks.name: genesis_proof_validity
checks.description: GENESIS proof (§11) compiles correctly from actual BlueEdge condition data
checks.details: 7 conditions → 4 compiled consequence objects. Scope escalation: LOCAL→REGIONAL→SYSTEMIC. Confidence inheritance: mixed evidence → ADVISORY_BOUND. Worked example complete.

checks.name: vocabulary_governance
checks.description: Three-layer vocabulary (L1/L2/L3) present for every consequence class
checks.details: 8 atomic classes (§12.1) + 3 combination classes (§12.2) = 11 vocabulary entries, all with L1/L2/L3

checks.name: persona_boundary_compliance
checks.description: Persona consumption contracts respect crystallized persona roles
checks.details: BOARDROOM=compressed, BALANCED=narrative, DENSE=not direct consumer, INVESTIGATION=full derivation chain. SW-Intel augments, never owns.

checks.name: prohibition_coverage
checks.details: §8.2 contains 14 prohibition rules. Rule #14 explicitly inherits all 13 LENS 75.x absolute prohibitions.

checks.name: doctrine_compliance
checks.description: Doctrine compliance checklist (§14) complete with 16 requirements
checks.details: 16/16 doctrine requirements satisfied: deterministic, traceable, evidence-bound, client-agnostic, compilation-not-summarization, persona-respecting, module-gated, 3-layer-vocabulary, combination-aware, no-hidden-AI, no-prescription, 75x-compliant, confidence-aware, scope-aware, cross-persona, no-topology-invention

checks.name: scope_separation
checks.description: Systemic consequences carry primary_locus distinct from consequence_scope
checks.details: §3.2 defines scope classification. §13 schema separates consequence_scope from primary_locus. §11.5 GENESIS proof demonstrates SYSTEMIC scope with DOMAIN-10 primary_locus.

checks.name: cross_persona_language
checks.description: L3 vocabulary uses operator cognition (cross-persona), not exclusively executive
checks.details: §12 field name: operator_consequence_title. §13 schema: operator_consequence_title (cross-persona). §10 defines per-persona compression.

checks.name: compilation_language
checks.description: Document uses compilation/compilation language, not projection/rendering/UI language
checks.details: §2 explicitly excludes rendering specification. No 'operator sees' language. Uses 'the runtime compiles' in §11.5.

checks.name: module_gating
checks.description: SW-Intel module gating preserved (OFF=no consequences, ON=full compilation)
checks.details: §9 defines gating model. §9.2 defines teaser extension. §9.3 defines compilation trigger.

checks.name: no_runtime_files
checks.description: No runtime files created or modified

checks.name: implementation_semantics
checks.details: 6 sections: primitive inventory, input contracts, output contracts, calibration assumptions, extension points, module responsibility map
